reviews.author: Gregory Price
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the use of a novel BPF ops structure for page table mappings, citing potential performance issues and unfairness to users. Suggested refactoring the DAX layer to create an ops structure that could serve as a basis for the BPF solution.

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand (Arm)
reviews.summary: Asked if MM people are on board with letting BPF handle page table mappings, seeking clarification on the feasibility of this approach.

2026-04-14.patch_summary: The patch aims to port the FAMFS file system into Fuse, but concerns have been raised about the use of a novel BPF ops structure for page table mappings.
